description: Send notifications to your own Kumulos destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise kumulos:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway/gateway-plus channels transform the envelope directly into a Kumulos notifications API JSON body and post it to messages.kumulos.com (no Apprise).
name: msg-to-kumulos

request.template: {"urls":"kumulos://${ customer_secrets.KUMULOS_APIKEY }/${ customer_secrets.KUMULOS_SERVERKEY }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}

{"urls":"kumulos://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.apikey_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.serverkey_secret }} }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}
